Jolli AI

Your private AI workspace.

Sign in to keep your chats, groups, memories, and school or work projects private to your account.

Private chats Only you can see your conversations.
Groups Create shared Jolli spaces for people and teams.
Projects Organize homework, work, study plans, and research.

Welcome to Jolli

Log in or create a new account.

Jolli uses Firebase Authentication. Your password is handled by Firebase, not stored directly by Jolli.
